onset.Description: Onset time of event in seconds relative to recording start

duration.Description: Duration of event in seconds (0 for instantaneous events)

name.Description: Event type or custom data-class name

Task.Description: Task name or index within the session

OptionAName.Description: Name of the image sprite shown in slot A

OptionBName.Description: Name of the image sprite shown in slot B

HandUsed.Description: Hand used to touch the chosen stimulus

ReactionTime.Description: Seconds from stimulus display to touch

displayTime.Description: Seconds since application start when the stimuli appeared on screen

ChoiceTime.Description: Seconds since application start when the choice touch was registered

ChoiceId.Description: Slot identifier matching ChosenOption in ChoiceEvents

RendererCenterX.Description: World-space X component of the renderer bounding box centre

RendererCenterY.Description: World-space Y component of the renderer bounding box centre

RendererCenterZ.Description: World-space Z component of the renderer bounding box centre

RendererSizeX.Description: World-space X extent of the renderer bounding box

RendererSizeY.Description: World-space Y extent of the renderer bounding box

RendererSizeZ.Description: World-space Z extent of the renderer bounding box

ColliderCenterX.Description: World-space X component of the collider bounding box centre

ColliderCenterY.Description: World-space Y component of the collider bounding box centre

ColliderCenterZ.Description: World-space Z component of the collider bounding box centre

ColliderSizeX.Description: World-space X extent of the collider bounding box

ColliderSizeY.Description: World-space Y extent of the collider bounding box

ColliderSizeZ.Description: World-space Z extent of the collider bounding box

TrialName.Description: Human-readable unique trial name, e.g. task1_t3
